content.en:
In 10,000 years, the Sky Splitting Technique has been completed!

130,000 years later, the Sky Splitting Technique has been completed!

Another 360,000 years have passed, and on this day, Ye Tian finally cultivated the Sky Splitting Technique to the consummation realm, although there is still an extreme realm, but Ye Tian has not tried to cultivate, not that there is no way to improve it, but that it is unnecessary.

It was just the Void Splitting Technique of the Consummation Realm, and Ye Tian only had the power of one blow, and after one blow, the divine power would consume ninety percent, and the divine soul power would also consume most of it.

Therefore, once he cultivated the Void Splitting Technique to the extreme level, he would not be able to use it at all with his current cultivation, so it would be better to slowly cultivate it in the future.

"The Sky Splitting Technique is complete, my strength is much stronger than before, I'm afraid that even if the incarnation of the Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor fights with me, I can easily suppress it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated his strength and was even expected to fight with the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestor incarnations.

As time passed, Ye Tian took a lot of elixirs, pills and special treasures to enhance his divine power and soul to accelerate the progress of his divine power and soul.

Coupled with the increasing effect of the ninth pole of the Nine Extremes True Body Technique, Ye Tian's divine power and divine soul were getting closer and closer to the limit.

Finally, on this day one million and three hundred thousand years later, Ye Tian's body, divine power, and divine soul all reached the limit, and without breaking through the realm, it was almost impossible to advance.

Now, Ye Tian only had one shackle left, that is, the shackles of the Endless Avenue Prototype of 99,999 meters, and only by raising it to the level of 100,000 meters long and forming a complete avenue could he be promoted to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

"My Endless Avenue contains a large number of avenues, the length and width have reached the limit of 99,999 meters, if you want to break this limit, it is a hundred times or even a thousand times more difficult than other true monarchs, just relying on your own penance, I don't know how long it will take to break the shackles!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he wouldn't take an auxiliary treasure like the Innate Origin Life that could help break the shackles, which would affect his foundation.

But that doesn't mean he can't use foreign objects!

For example, there is a treasure that he can take, and that is the Heavenly Soul Pill!

The Heavenly Soul Pill can assist in the cultivation of various methods, supernatural powers, and secret techniques, and naturally it can also allow Ye Tian to comprehend the Great Dao with terrifying understanding, thus breaking the shackles in one fell swoop.

As for whether a Heavenly Soul Pill could help him break the shackles, Ye Tian didn't know very well, but he had to try, otherwise he didn't want to waste countless hours to break this small level.

took out a Heavenly Soul Pill and took it orally by Ye Tianyi.

Immediately, the process of 10,000 years passing in an instant began.

Enlightenment!

Enlightenment!

Enlightenment!

Ye Tian opened the super god-level super comprehension talent and went all out to participate in the Great Dao of Enlightenment.

Because Ye Tian had received too much inheritance, his knowledge and heritage far surpassed that of other True Monarchs, coupled with the assistance of the Transcendent Comprehension Talent and the Heavenly Soul Pill, Ye Tian's progress was too fast.

It can be said that Ye Tian has analyzed and understood the Endless Avenue from almost all aspects, and his perception of the Endless Avenue far surpasses that of before.

Soon, the effect of a Heavenly Soul Pill was gone.

Ye Tian also cultivated for 10,000 years with the help of the Heavenly Soul Pill, but to his disappointment, he still did not break the shackles and advance to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

"It's just a little bit close!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Without saying a word, he took a Heavenly Soul Pill again and continued to comprehend the Endless Dao.

This time, he finally broke the shackles with the help of the effect of the second Heavenly Soul Pill.

Rumble!!!!!

In the origin space of Ye Tian's avenue, the prototype of the endless avenue suddenly changed from 99,999 meters to 100,000 meters, although it only increased by one meter, it was an earth-shaking transformation.

The power of the Great Dao is growing wildly, far beyond what it used to be.

In terms of level, the power and origin of the newly transformed Great Dao seem to be higher than the previous level, if the power of the Dao Ancestor's Great Dao is compared to the power of the high-level Great Dao, and the power of the Great Dao of the True Monarch is the power of the low-level Great Dao, then the power of his current Great Dao is the power of the Intermediate Great Dao.

That's the essential difference!

When the prototype of the Endless Avenue transformed into a complete avenue, there was no longer a distance limit, and it turned into a sea of avenues, which can also be called the sea of the Origin Avenue.

It's just that compared to other half-step True Ancestors, Ye Tian's Great Dao Sea is too big, I don't know how many times bigger, if those True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors know the scale of Ye Tian's Great Dao Sea, I'm afraid they will be shocked one by one.

The shackles disappeared, and Ye Tian began to try to fuse the divine soul with the Great Dao, and only after this step was completed could he be regarded as a true half-step True Ancestor.

I saw that Ye Tian's soul space and the Great Dao Origin Space began to merge step by step, and the divine soul directly came to the Great Dao Origin Sea, and the endless Great Dao Origin power began to refine the divine soul.

This process is also a process of integration!

Once the Great Dao Origin Space and the Soul Space are completely fused, it means that the Divine Soul and the Great Dao are perfectly integrated, which is equivalent to crossing the process of half-step True Ancestor and directly entering the True Ancestor realm.

True Ancestor, every move contains the power of the Great Dao Origin, and a single blow can be called a peerless supernatural power.

Even because the True Ancestor's divine consciousness contained the power of the Great Dao Origin, it could easily break through the space and descend into the endless and distant realm.

This is also the reason why the True Ancestors can leave a place of inheritance in each universe, and can easily descend a wisp of consciousness.

The True Ancestor is too strong, and his abilities and means are far superior to the True Monarch.

Unless he is a true genius, an ordinary True Monarch is like an ant in the eyes of the True Ancestor.

For example, Ye Tian himself had just entered the half-step True Ancestor realm, and he felt that he was at least ten times stronger, and he could easily suppress his previous self.

This moment.

Ye Tian was a little inflated, he felt that those incarnations of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor descended on the Quasi-Dao Realm, he could be pinched to death at will, and only when the incarnation of the Sixth Heavenly Dao Ancestor descended could he really threaten him.

But is there a Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in this realm?

Ye Tian felt no, at least not now!

"You still can't float, the quasi-Dao realm is still evolving, and once it evolves into the true Dao realm, the true ancestors can come. I'm only half a step True Ancestor realm, and the difference between me and those Invincible True Ancestors is still very big!"

When Ye Tian thought about it, he became calm and no longer swelled.

The process of fusing the Divine Soul with the Great Dao is relatively long, such as those half-step True Ancestors in the Quasi-Dao Realm, many of whom have not yet fused to the limit.

And Ye Tian's Divine Soul and Great Dao were too powerful, so the fusion time must have taken longer.

However, Ye Tian had enough resources in his hands to shorten his time.

No matter how much it is reduced, no matter how much it is assisted by the time formation, it will take at least a few hundred thousand years to completely end this process.

Ye Tian is not in a hurry, anyway, in the quasi-Dao realm, there is no way to break through to the True Ancestor realm at the moment, and it is not a bad thing to stay in the half-step True Ancestor realm for a while longer.
